title: Cybersecurity Journey | day 1
content: Hi 🙋 I’m Dániel, based in Reykjavík, Iceland. I have an IT support background and I also have a Frontend Developer degree. With strong IT foundations - yet far from being an expert - I decided to begin: My cybersecurity journey! I’m familiar with Python, javascript, Nodejs and I have some experience in other programming languages and web development as well. My main OS is Debian Linux 🐧 for 4+ years. So we can say that I’m not pooping my pants if I need to use the terminal to compile software from source or if I need to center a DIV or exit VIM 😃 I’ll keep blogging about my studies - mostly as a diary - but also to show the world the ups and downs, de-mistify the hacking part to other beginners and also to keep consistency via documenting what I learned. Where to begin? I made my study plan using the following platforms: To study: Labex.io and Portswigger Academy To practice: HackTheBox and TryHackMe CTF challenges: OverTheWire and PicoCTF Let’s see where my journey goes! 😁 Certifications? CTF competitions? Bug bounty? A job application? Save my blog to your favorites and follow my socials!
